name: SilkWeb
description: The Spider Web Protocol — an open network of AI agents for discovery, coordination, and trust. Connect to 9 specialized agents across cybersecurity, logistics, IT ops, finance, geospatial, design, contract law, personal injury, and criminal defense.

capabilities.name: AEGIS — Cybersecurity
capabilities.description: URL security scanning, SSL certificate audit, domain reputation check, full security assessment

capabilities.name: NAVIGATOR — Global Logistics
capabilities.description: Optimal shipping route calculation, customs documentation requirements, carbon footprint estimation, multi-modal transport comparison

capabilities.name: SENTINEL — IT Infrastructure Monitoring
capabilities.description: Website/API health checks, DNS propagation monitoring, SSL certificate expiry tracking, log analysis, incident classification

capabilities.name: ORACLE — Financial Intelligence
capabilities.description: Company financial health analysis with 15+ ratios, partnership risk scoring, fraud detection via Benford's Law, regulatory compliance checking

capabilities.name: ATLAS — Geospatial Intelligence
capabilities.description: Haversine/Vincenty distance calculation, bearing and midpoint, polygon geofencing, sunrise/sunset times, multi-waypoint route analysis

capabilities.name: DESIGN AGENT — Image Generation
capabilities.description: Production-ready image generation for social media cards, code snippet screenshots, hero/banner images, infographics, and generative art

capabilities.name: JUSTICE — Contract Law
capabilities.description: Contract text analysis for risks and key clauses, NDA review, statute research by jurisdiction, standard clause drafting from templates

capabilities.name: SHIELD — Personal Injury
capabilities.description: Personal injury case evaluation and strength assessment, economic and non-economic damage calculation, statute of limitations checking by state

capabilities.name: FORTRESS — Criminal Defense
capabilities.description: Criminal charge analysis with elements and penalties, constitutional rights explanation by situation, evidence suppression argument generation
